nasb.text: Then the sons of Benjamin came out of Gibeah and felled to the ground on that day 22,000 men of Israel.

esv.text: The people of Benjamin came out of Gibeah and destroyed on that day 22,000 men of the Israelites.

cnv.text: 便雅憫人從基比亞出來，那一天使二萬二千以色列人倒地身亡。

ccb.text: 便雅悯人从基比亚出来，当天杀了以色列军两万二千人。
